summary: Engine shared library + CLI: state checkout, cas_push, status-comment upsert, resolve_executable, set_check_run, match_run_by_cid, route, validate_protocol, open_gate, do_answer, decide fold.
Pure planner: (state, protocol, command) -> action JSON. Enters via enter_root, sequences recursively on NODE_PATH. Commands: start/reset/continue/answer/override/resolve-gate. Never sniffs events.
The SOLE writer of non-initial state. decide() fold over verdict severities -> mutate state, publish, CAS-push, re-dispatch. Tolerates a missing state file (recovers a lost init).
Pure tree navigation over a protocol dict + a node-path (list of ids). No I/O, no git. Addressing and structural relations; state-file paths for any node at any depth.
Data-driven, language-agnostic check runner. Resolves each check for a state-id to an executable, runs it against the Check ABI, aggregates verdicts. Forwards CHECK_PARAMS and stamps on_fail.
Recursive fan-out AND-barrier. Evaluates a nested fanout barrier addressed by NODE_PATH; on all-done it bubbles the nested join upward.
Validate a protocol.json (structural via jsonschema if importable + semantic via validate_protocol/check_depth) and render it as an ASCII tree. Authoring aid.
JSON Schema backing the protocol.json DSL (docs/PROTOCOL-DSL.md). Strict authoring schema used by the linter's structural layer.
Production code-review pipeline: preflight (agent gate) -> review fan-out (grumpy + security legs) -> join (AND-barrier) -> approval (human gate) -> done. Selected by /review via lib.route triggers.

Deterministic code-review checks: rubric-coverage, schema-valid, traces-exist-in-diff, adherence-coverage, docs/tests-updated-with-code, plan/spec-present, preflight-schema-valid. Each obeys the Check ABI.
Code-review publish hooks (zone 4, trusted): publish-verdict, publish-grumpy, publish-security, conclude-preflight, _review helper. Emit {conclusion,summary} and post PR reviews/comments.

Non-interactive mental-model recovery: 4 parallel methods (legion, codeset, ubiquitous-language, socratic sub-pipeline) -> join -> combine merge that pushes outputs to an orphan _mental_model branch. Ref-/UI-keyed instance.

Interactive mental-model recovery: identical to recover-mental-model but socratic answering is a human issue-channel gate (kind:gate, channel:issue). Human answers with /answer comments; mm-interactive-resume.yml drives the answer command.
Depth-4 nested fan-out/sub-pipeline tree (/deep-review) exercising the recursive engine with stub agents. Used to prove the single recursive code path across shapes.
Dynamic fan-out stub: legs expanded at runtime from items.json via expand/expand-files. Exercises runtime-determined fan-out width in the engine.
Automated feature implementation protocol: design -> implement, with ledger-consistent/ledger-wellformed/read-these-first-consistent and plan/spec-present checks. Fully automated (auto).

FastAPI app factory create_app(). 9 GET routes: /healthz, /protocols[/{p}[/instances[/{ident}/status|stats|evidence]]], /stats, /gates. Bearer auth via require_auth; protocol names validated against traversal.
Reads engine state as a data contract (never imports the engine). Parses protocol.json + state YAML into status/stats/gates/instances envelopes. _pr_of maps pr-<N> instances; trigger summaries.
httpx-based GitHub REST client. Bearer-token headers, error taxonomy (NotFound, RateLimited, UpstreamError, GitHubError). Reads repo/runs/state-branch content for the visibility API.
Frozen Settings dataclass built via Settings.from_env. Required env: API_BEARER_TOKEN, GITHUB_TOKEN, GITHUB_REPO; optional ENGINE_WORKFLOWS, STATE_BRANCH, PROTOCOLS_REF, GITHUB_API_URL.
ASGI entry point: builds Settings.from_env(os.environ) and app = create_app(settings, client=GitHubClient(settings)) for uvicorn to serve.
Pydantic response envelopes: ProtocolList, InstanceList, GatesResponse, GlobalStats. Document/validate the top-level shapes returned to clients (bodies are dicts from state_reader).

Pure protocol resolution for the installer (stdlib only, no I/O). Given a parsed protocol.json, finds every agent workflow it references at any nesting depth (states, fan-out branches, nested sub-pipelines).
Install receipt (.github/agent-factory/.install.json): write, diff, drift, version compat. Content hash of every installed file so a re-sync detects orphans and local drift. stdlib only.
Installer shell script: drops the engine + chosen protocols into any repo. Entry point for adopting the engine; drives resolve.py/receipt.py. See dist/README.md.
The router workflow: union static on:, read-only route job (lib.route scans all protocols' triggers), then calls the reusable engine. Replaces the per-protocol trigger shim. Must live on main.
Reusable on:workflow_call engine: the 4 trust zones (plan -> dispatch -> checks -> advance) for one protocol path. Engine and agent never share a job or credential. Must live on main.

gh-aw agent sources (*-agent.md) compiled to committed *-agent.lock.yml (workflows run from the lock). preflight, grumpy, security, mm-* (legion/codeset/ubiquitous/socratic), impl-feature-auto, dyn-stub, etc. strict:false + sandbox.agent:false (egress firewall deliberately disabled).

Owns answer-comments on marked mental-model issues. Parses /answer <id>: <value> comments and drives the engine's answer command (closes the issue, resumes phase2 once all questions answered). Orchestrator skips non-PR issue comments.

63 pytest modules: planner+advance+CAS (test_engine), decide, checks, runchecks, join, recursion (test_recursive_*), gates, dynamic fanout, deep fanout e2e, recover-mm, impl-feature-auto, dist, api. Shared conftest fixtures (fake agentic-state origin, ENGINE_LOCAL=1).

Minimal engine shapes + evidence/diff fixtures for capability/regression testing: cap-single-agent, simple-fanout, cap-mp-fanout-gate, deep-fanout, gate-deep, too-deep, dyn-fanout-*, subpipeline-gate, evidence-*.json, diff-pr*.txt.
Deep design rationale for the engine and a protocol-authoring walkthrough. The canonical 'why it works this way' reference.
protocol.json DSL field reference, backed by protocol.schema.json. What every field means when authoring a protocol.
What is/isn't implemented and why (deviations from the original spec). READ THIS BEFORE EXTENDING ANYTHING — many 'missing' pieces are deliberate. High-churn doc (36 changes/90d).
Authoring Protocols and Workflows hub: gathers the tutorial, the DSL reference, and the validate-and-visualize linter. Start here to build a new protocol.

Product-level overview: the engine, a protocol library (notably code-review), a distribution installer (dist/), and a read-only visibility API (api/). Explains why it exists (gh-aw + porch each solve half).

Guidance for Claude Code: the core mental model, engine vs protocol separation, four trust zones, stable ABIs, running tests, editing gh-aw agents, operational gotchas, and the NODE_PATH recursive coordinate.

uv project manifest. Runtime deps (fastapi, httpx, PyYAML, uvicorn) for the api/ service; dev group (pytest, respx, jsonschema). requires-python >=3.10; [tool.uv] package=false (application, not a library).
